---
title: "Homework 8"
author: "Anthony Ferraro"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
linkcolor: blue
urlcolor: blue
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, comment = NA, fig.align = "center", out.width = "50%", warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)

theme_set(theme_minimal())

library(Lock5Data)
data("StudentSurvey")
```


#### Making a BMI Column
```{r}
knitr::kable(StudentSurvey %>% 
    mutate(BMI = 701 * (Weight / (Height ^ 2))) %>%
    select(Sex, Weight, Height, BMI) %>%
    head(n = 10))
```

^[Question 1 Complete]
